solution: 
```java
class Solution {
    public int minFlipsMonoIncr(String s) {
        int flips = 0;
        int onesCount = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
            if (s.charAt(i) == '1') {
                onesCount++;
            } else {
                flips = Math.min(flips + 1, onesCount);
            }
        }

        return flips;
    }
}
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution iterates through the string once, keeping track of the number of 1s encountered and the minimum flips needed. When a '0' is found, it compares flipping this '0' to 1 or flipping all previous '1's to 0. This greedy approach ensures optimal efficiency.
